# Laura Piccolo Notary Signing Agent

> Laura Piccolo is a California commissioned notary public and certified loan signing agent based in Pleasant Hill, CA. She provides professional notary and loan signing services throughout the East Bay and Tri-Valley—Walnut Creek, Concord, Martinez, Lafayette, Orinda, Moraga, Alamo, Danville, San Ramon, Pleasanton, Dublin, Livermore, Oakland, and surrounding communities. Mobile notary; appointments at offices, homes, hospitals, or other convenient locations. Same-day, evening, and weekend appointments available by request.

## Contact

- **Website:** [https://trustedseals.net/](https://trustedseals.net/)
- **Phone:** [(925) 266-2582](tel:+19252662582)
- **Email:** [Laura@trustedseals.net](mailto:Laura@trustedseals.net)
- **Location:** Pleasant Hill, CA 94523
- **Service area:** East Bay and Tri-Valley, California (Contra Costa and Alameda counties)
- **Google Business Profile:** [Leave a review / view listing](https://maps.app.goo.gl/FFnZtsaVFVT6oHn77)

## Services

- Loan signings and mortgage closings (buyer/seller packages, refinances, HELOCs, reverse mortgages)
- Estate plans and living trusts
- Power of attorney (general, durable, healthcare, limited)
- Hospital and care facility visits; advanced care directives
- General notarization (affidavits, business contracts, adoption, parental consent)
- Apostille facilitation, fingerprinting, background checks
- Free general notarizations for U.S. veterans (Stamp for a Cause, within 20 miles); discounted loan signings for veterans

## Key information

- **Credentials:** California Commissioned Notary Public; Certified Loan Signing Agent; Loan Signing System certified; National Notary Association (NNA) Member (member since 2023); NNA-certified loan signing agents are background screened annually; California State University, East Bay Alumna; bonded and errors &amp; omissions insured.
- **Hours:** 9am–5:30pm Monday–Saturday; evening, weekend, and senior hours available by appointment.
- **Disclaimer:** Laura Piccolo is a notary public and is not an attorney. She cannot give legal advice or advise on the content of your documents.
